# AIOWrap

> AIOWrap is a native macOS app for running many web apps — and many independent accounts of the same web app — side by side in fully isolated, persistent sessions. Built on the system WebKit engine (WKWebView), not Electron.

## Key facts
- Platform: macOS 14 (Sonoma) or later, Apple Silicon.
- Core capability: run multiple isolated accounts of the same site (e.g. two WhatsApp Web accounts) at once, each in its own persistent session container.
- Personas: group accounts (Personal, Work, Clients) and switch between them.
- Privacy: no telemetry; web sessions stay local on the user's Mac.
- Notifications: web notifications bridge to macOS Notification Center.
- Pricing: one-time license, $19, with a 14-day free trial. Payments via Polar.
- Publisher: XploreDatum Technologies LLP.

## Links
- Home: https://aiowrap.com/
- Download (macOS .dmg): https://github.com/xploredatum/AIOWrap-releases/releases/latest/download/Aiowrap.dmg
